{{Infobox madra
| name = Dreadgod madra
| introduced = Wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Dreadgod madra]] provides a way to improve without spending a fortune.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c11">''Wintersteel'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Abyssal Palace towers]] contain [[scripts]] that capture and store [[Dreadgod madra]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c13">''Wintersteel'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] suggests using [[Dreadgod madra]] to make puppet-constructs that could fight [[Monarchs]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c25">''Waybound'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
